query:
SELECT
            v.episode_id,
            v.value::text AS "value!",
            v.reason,
            COUNT(*) AS "count!"
        FROM vote v
        JOIN episode e ON e.id = v.episode_id
        WHERE e.show_id = $1
          AND ($2::int IS NULL OR e.season_number = $2)
          AND v.reason IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY v.episode_id, v.value, v.reason
